brand.name: Bluethumb Technologies
brand.tagline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.

hero.headline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.
hero.lede: Bluethumb creates socially innovative financial technologies that help businesses strengthen communities and help individuals make better-informed decisions.

about.title: Innovative financial products designed for real-world progress.
about.body: Bluethumb Technologies builds modern financial products that connect business growth with community value, and help investors understand markets with greater confidence.

focus.title: Community-centered loyalty
focus.body: Connecting businesses and communities through smarter loyalty technology.

focus.title: AI-powered intelligence
focus.body: Helping investors understand markets through clear, explainable intelligence.

products.title: Two distinct experiences. One mission.
products.body: Blueprint connects retailers, customers, and communities. Trading Intelligence gives self-directed investors a multi-brain reasoning engine with paper-first safety.

blueprint.title: Reward customers. Support communities. Create impact.
paragraphs: Blueprint is a next-generation loyalty platform designed to help retailers attract and retain customers while creating positive impact within the communities they serve.
Unlike traditional loyalty programs focused only on transactions, Blueprint connects retailers, consumers, and local communities around a stronger shared outcome.

highlights.title: Loyalty that strengthens local businesses and the communities around them.

items.title: Retailer growth
items.copy: Help local businesses attract new customers and earn repeat visits through shared rewards.

items.title: Member rewards
items.copy: Give shoppers a mobile loyalty experience that feels useful — not another unused points card.

items.title: Community impact
items.copy: Connect everyday purchases to outcomes that matter in the neighborhoods retailers serve.

items.title: Shared value loop
items.copy: Shop local, unlock rewards, and reinforce the relationship between merchants and members.

trading.title: Professional-grade trading intelligence for self-directed investors.
trading.lede: Built for people who trade on Wealthsimple, Questrade, and similar platforms — and want better information, not faster wires. Bluethumb watches live markets, scores every symbol through a full intelligence stack, and explains its thinking in plain English before you act.
trading.paperFirst: It runs in paper mode by default: full dashboard, alerts, forecasts, and simulated fills — with no real capital at risk until you explicitly connect a broker.
trading.committee: Under the hood this is a trading desk of specialists, not a single model guessing. Technicals, news, forecasts, risk, portfolio, and market memory each weigh in every few seconds. Agreement raises confidence; contradiction lowers it — and the dashboard shows you why.

ideal: Self-directed investors who want clearer decision support
Traders who care about why a symbol looks attractive
Teams evaluating AI-assisted trading without enterprise budgets
notFor: Fully unattended live trading without oversight

why.title: News → signals
why.copy: Trusted headlines are scored and linked to the symbols you actually hold or watch.

why.title: Multi-layer confidence
why.copy: Buys and sells are considered only when independent systems agree — not one black-box score.

why.title: Specialist committee
why.copy: Risk, portfolio, news, memory, and forecast agents fuse views before a trade is sized.

why.title: Plain-English reasoning
why.copy: Every insight and fill comes with language you can act on — not opaque model output.

why.title: Walk-forward forecasts
why.copy: Price paths validated against real history, from minutes to months ahead.

why.title: Paper-first safety
why.copy: Full experience and simulated fills before any live broker connection.

why.title: Three-currency book
why.copy: CAD, USD, and crypto each keep their own wallet, holdings, and P&L view.

why.title: You stay in control
why.copy: Alerts and recommendations are decision support — the system suggests; you decide.

pipeline.title: How information becomes a decision
pipeline.subtitle: One funnel from market noise to an explainable, paper-first action.

stages.title: News & headlines
stages.subtitle: Scored stories tied to your symbols

stages.title: Confidence & forecast
stages.subtitle: Fused score, evidence, and path ahead

stages.title: Your dashboard
stages.subtitle: Sized hint — paper fill by default

stackIntro.title: Many specialists. One coherent story per symbol.
stackIntro.body: Layers run every few seconds. Later ones can scale or veto earlier ones. Alignment raises confidence; disagreement lowers it — so you see one clear picture, not conflicting silos.

dataStack.name: Chart & regime
dataStack.copy: Trend, momentum, and market weather — is this symbol bullish, choppy, or risk-off?

dataStack.name: News & alerts
dataStack.copy: Headlines and events scored to tickers, with severity, source trust, and acknowledge controls.

dataStack.name: Walk-forward forecasts
dataStack.copy: Validated price paths and probabilities — trained only on history the model had not seen yet.

dataStack.name: Multi-agent council
dataStack.copy: Portfolio, risk, graph, memory, and narrative agents publish views before any size is set.

dataStack.name: Confidence fusion
dataStack.copy: Evidence is fused into one explainable confidence record — including contradictions and freshness.

dataStack.name: Risk gates & paper fill
dataStack.copy: Hard limits, pause controls, and simulated execution by default until you enable live trading.

features.title: Intelligence workspace
features.copy: News, forecasts, drivers, scoreboard, graph, and live feed in one place.

features.title: Live reasoning
features.copy: See what the engine is considering symbol by symbol — and leave feedback.

features.title: Explainable trade history
features.copy: Every fill includes P&L and a plain-English why.

features.title: CAD · USD · Crypto wallets
features.copy: Segmented books that mirror how self-directed investors actually hold money.

features.title: Safety controls
features.copy: Pause, emergency stop, safe mode, and deploy health checks built in.

features.title: Paper-first by design
features.copy: SIM mode is the default — no hidden live orders.

trading.heroImageAlt: Bluethumb Trading Intelligence portfolio command center

gallery.title: The surfaces investors use every session.
gallery.body: Portfolio health, forecasts, alerts, trade history, and decision review — live in Bluethumb Trading Intelligence.

items.title: Portfolio command center
items.copy: CAD, USD, and crypto books with cash, holdings, unrealized P&L, session profit, and win rate in one live view.

items.title: Forecast cards
items.copy: Per-symbol BUY/SELL outlooks with walk-forward paths, confidence, expected move, and probability of upside.

items.title: Intelligence alerts
items.copy: Severity-ranked market and news signals tied to symbols, sources, confidence, and one-click acknowledgment.

items.title: Explainable trade log
items.copy: Every fill with side, size, P&L, cumulative profit, and the engine reason behind the action.

items.title: Decision report
items.copy: Plain-English breakdowns: confidence, key factors, and how each system voted.

items.title: Session performance
items.copy: Live engine status, session P&L, trade count, and win rate at a glance.

reviewFlow.title: Before you trade, see the fused recommendation.
reviewFlow.body: Review Buy walks a ticket through rating, confidence, odds, and specialist votes — then recommends buy, sell, or wait with an optimal size.

steps.label: 01 · Consensus
steps.title: Fused outlook
steps.copy: AI rating, confidence, favorable odds, and a final HOLD/BUY/SELL consensus with an optimal ticket.

steps.label: 02 · System votes
steps.title: How each brain voted
steps.copy: Technical, news, alerts, profile, memory, and forecast systems each cast a weighted vote with live reasoning.

steps.label: 03 · Policy & risk
steps.title: Validation to decision
steps.copy: Backtests, scenarios, risk guardrails, and adaptive layers feed the final buy/sell/wait policy.

mission.title: Technology should empower people.
mission.body: Bluethumb Technologies creates products that simplify complexity and create meaningful impact. Blueprint helps communities and businesses connect. Bluethumb Trading Intelligence helps investors better understand markets.
mission.statement: Build technology that helps people make better decisions.

footer.title: Ready to talk products, partnerships, or a demo?
footer.note: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.
